title: [Foreigners welcome|海外文宣] Let the world know about ChiNazi

replies.msg:
Sorry for the bad English first

Please share and push this post if you find it useful


Most of the people in here know what ChiNazi is
and we all know that the whole world is under the threat of ChiNazi and that has to be stopped
Therefore we have to spread the message of "CCP is Nazi" to the rest of the world

Only the rest of the world stand as one can fight back ChiNazi

I have prepared some materials down there for you guys to spread this message
Please use Reddit or Twitter or any means to share the truth to the rest of the world
Please let me know if there is any mistake and suggestions


Let start working on 29/9 Global Anti-ChiNazi Day


---------中英分隔線----------------

如果有用嘅話請大家Share同推上去

請善用圖片模式，可以會有新嘅文宣一次過睇哂

我相信係呢度嘅巴打都會知道咩係 ChiNazi
大家都明支共一日唔倒台，全球都會受到威脅
所以一定要向全球散播“支共就係納粹”嘅信息

等佢地知道而家嘅支共比起當年二戰時期嘅納粹更恐怖
唯有係國際聯手先會贏

我整咗d文宣俾大家
希望大家可以善用Reddit同Twitter去令更多外國人知道咩係Chinazi
(搵KOL都係一個spread得好快嘅做法)
如果有打錯請指正
同埋如果想要D咩類型嘅文宣可以講低，睇下整唔整到

請大家開始準備9月29日全球反支納粹日
